account.description: The AWS account ID that owns the resource.

id.description: The full ARN (Amazon Resource Name) for the resource.

partition.description: The partition the resource is in, such as 'aws' or 'aws-cn'.

region.description: The AWS region where the resource is located.

resource.description: The specific resource identifier within the ARN.

service.description: The AWS service namespace that the resource belongs to.
